title: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq:ACAD) - Stock Analysis
text: ACADIA Pharmaceuticals stock analysis. The analyst consensus is a Moderate Buy with an average price target of $32.53. According to 19 analysts, ACADIA Pharma (ACAD) has a Buy consensus rating as of May 2026. Analysts are increasingly optimistic about ACADIA's prospects given strong commercial execution and upcoming pipeline catalysts. Recent analyst price target updates have moved from $37 to about $44, with analysts pointing to refreshed models reflecting recent guidance and ongoing commercial momentum. The updated price targets incorporate the successful DAYBUE STIX launch and growing confidence in the remlifanserin Phase II program. Acadia's profitability trajectory is improving with expanding margins expected as the company scales revenue.
